---
title: "MSP input Netherlands"
autogen: true
format:
  html:
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 250px
      body-width: 1500px
      margin-width: 0px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
---

NA

::: {layout="[ [1] ]"}

```{=html}
<iframe style="border:none;" height="800" width="100%" src="https://viewer.openearth.nl/compendium-greater-north-sea-embedded/?folders=144094709,146388423&layers=146620616,146563816&layerNames=Wind%20farms%20Roadmap%202030%20%28SVNZ%29,SVNZ%20structural%20vision%20map,%20North%20Sea%20Program%202022-2027."></iframe>
```

:::
